sales.description:
ANDRONICUS I (OF TREBIZOND), 1225-1235. AR Aspron Trachy (2.91 gms). NGC MS, Strike: 4/5 Surface: 4/5.
S-2148 (Uncertain Nicaea); DOC IV, pg. 537, 1 (Anonymous/Uncertain); S. Bendall, "An Early Coinage of the Empire of Trebizond" (Numismatic Circular CX.3; 6/2002). Obverse: Virgin Mary standing facing, placing right hand on chest and raising the other in benediction; Reverse: Christ Chalcites standing facing, placing hand on chest and holding Gospels. Fresh argent surfaces that glisten with lu...
